Orbit **0.1.1** — library content on the home hero, smarter Switch and GameHub imports, a playing screen, and launch-path editing.

## Highlights

- **Switch content inventory** — version and installed DLC on the home hero; dedicated Switch content visualizer
- **GameHub shortcuts** — import verified `.app` shortcuts from Applications; Play opens them via `gamehub://` deep links
- **Playing screen** — full-screen view with artwork and stop button while a game session is active
- **Launch path editing** — fix titles that fail to open from the game edit page

## What's included

### Switch (Astris)

- Library scanner groups base games, updates, and DLC from ROM folders
- Switch content visualizer (Settings → Import → Switch content visualizer)
- Home hero shows game version and installed DLC count; DLC names from ROM filename brackets
- Launch resolves to the base `.nsp` / `.xci` ROM; updates are left for the emulator
- Import skips AppleDouble `._*` sidecars, updates, DLC, and language packs

### Steam

- Home hero shows build ID and add-on count for Cyberpunk 2077 (AppID `1091500`) — proof of concept

### GameHub

- Import verified shortcuts from `/Applications` and `~/Applications` (`com.gamehub.shortcut.*`)
- Play opens the shortcut `.app`, which forwards the deep link to GameHub
- Setup instructions on the Import screen

### Launcher & sessions

- Full-screen playing view during active sessions
- Edit launch path on the game edit page; install size refreshes when the path changes

### Changed

- GameHub importer scans shortcuts only (no arbitrary `.exe` folders)
- macOS Applications scan excludes GameHub shortcuts
- Home content stats use compact typography; version/DLC pills removed from game tiles

### Fixed

- Astris launch opens the real ROM instead of macOS metadata sidecars on exFAT volumes

## Install

**Requirements:** macOS 12+, Apple Silicon (CI publishes `aarch64` builds).

1. Download **`Orbit-0.1.1-aarch64.dmg`** below
2. Open the DMG and drag **Orbit** to Applications
3. Launch from Applications — grant permissions if macOS prompts for file access

Verify downloads with `SHA256SUMS.txt`.

## Build from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit.git
cd orbit
yarn install
yarn tauri:dev
yarn release:macos
```

See [RUNNING.md](https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit/blob/main/RUNNING.md) and [docs/THEMES.md](https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit/blob/main/docs/THEMES.md).
